message:
test(integration): expand integration test suite for BackupStore and UpdateOptions API

Add 204 lines of new integration tests validating the current public
API surface of BackupStore and UpdateOptions. Tests cover installer
end-to-end workflows including backup creation, update option
configuration, and storage lifecycle management, ensuring the test
harness stays aligned with recent API refactors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
